summary: Tested unified Home feed features (stories, reels, highlighted posts, regular posts), /api/feed/home endpoint, navigation, and like functionality. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All requested features working correctly.

issues: WebGL error in console when loading face recognition features - expected in headless/test environment, works in real browser

passed_tests: Backend: /api/feed/home returns 200 OK
Backend: /api/feed/home returns correct data structure (stories, highlighted_posts, reels_preview, posts)
Backend: /api/feed/home rejects unauthorized requests (401)
Backend: Created story appears in feed
Backend: Created post appears in feed
Backend: Post like updates count correctly
Backend: Post unlike decreases count
Backend: Stories have viewed field
Backend: Highlighted posts have is_highlighted=true
Backend: View story marks as viewed
Backend: Reels preview has required fields
Backend: Home route accessible
Backend: Health endpoint returns 200
UI: FaceConnect header visible
UI: Add Story button visible (data-testid=add-story-btn)
UI: Stories horizontal scroll row displays correctly
UI: Reels section with See All button visible (data-testid=see-all-reels-btn)
UI: Reels preview thumbnails display
UI: Featured Posts section with sparkle icon and 'Featured' badge
UI: Regular posts feed displays with like/comment/share buttons
UI: Like button works - fills red and shows count when clicked
UI: Unlike works - outline heart when unliked
UI: Bottom navigation visible (Home, Chat, Profiles, Settings, FAB)
UI: Home nav (data-testid=nav-home) navigates to /
UI: Profiles nav (data-testid=nav-profiles) navigates to /profiles
UI: See All Reels button navigates to /reels page
UI: Reels page shows full-screen video viewer
UI: FAB main button visible (data-testid=fab-main)
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx properly implements all unified feed sections with correct data-testid attributes
BottomNav.jsx correctly shows Home and Profiles tabs with proper navigation
/api/feed/home endpoint returns well-structured data with stories, highlighted posts, reels preview, and regular posts
WebSocket real-time updates for new posts and likes are implemented in Home.jsx
Highlighted posts are correctly filtered based on likes count (>= 1 like in last 7 days)
seed_data_creation: Created test stories and posts for feed testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Home feed fully functional with all sections: Stories (horizontal scroll), Reels preview (with See all navigation to /reels), Featured Posts (highlighted based on likes), Regular posts (with like/comment/share). Navigation working correctly - Home tab goes to / (unified feed), Profiles tab goes to /profiles (face recognition dashboard). WebSocket is implemented for real-time updates but may show connection warnings in test environment.
